6. Experiments with real kinematic data
6.1. Pedestrian kinematic experiment
To verify the performance of kinematic PPP, a pedestrian kinematic
experiment was carried out in Wuhan, China, on DOY 95, 2024. The
Sino M300 Plus receiver and the Wisdom Beidou P100 GNSS antenna
were used for data collection, which can simultaneously track L1/L2,
E1/E5b, and B1I/B3I signals. The experiment spans from 02:29:10 to
03:47:19 UTC, lasting a total of 4690 s with a sampling interval of 1 s.
The reference trajectory was calculated by using RTK, with the

4. The HB-GEC strategy improves horizontal and vertical positioning
accuracies by 8.4 % and 42.5 %, respectively, compared to B-GC. For
stations located within the HAS excluded areas, the HB-GEC strategy
enhances horizontal and vertical accuracies by 1.3 % and 44.9 %,
respectively, relative to H-GE. These results demonstrate that the
integration of PPP-B2b and HAS can leverage the complementary
strengths of both services, signif
